baseline.label: quality-cleared TP4 llm-scaler U4 decode
baseline.notes: Accepted p512/n512 comparison target. Longer accepted p512/n1536 quality-conservative anchor is 37.552538 tok/s output.

runs.label: direct XPU Q/K RMS helper
runs.learning: The helper is active in AOT but breaks better existing compile fusion around INT4 GEMM/RMS while preserving the tiny Q/K allreduce boundary.

runs.label: llm-scaler MoE logits decode path
runs.learning: Fusing router top-k into the decode MoE kernel did not beat the existing split router + U4 decode path.

runs.label: TP2/PP2 four-card layout
runs.learning: The smaller TP allreduce group did not compensate for single-request pipeline idle time. This layout is not useful for single-session latency on MiniMax.

runs.label: KV cache fp8 generic
runs.learning: Generic FP8 KV is accepted by the XPU stack, but at 512 context it is slower and has possible quality risk, so it is not a primary path.

runs.label: KV cache fp8_e5m2 explicit
runs.learning: XPU FlashAttention metadata path raises ValueError: Unrecognized FP8 dtype: fp8_e5m2.

external_references.title: vLLM speculative decoding documentation
external_references.note: Model-based methods such as EAGLE/MTP/draft-model are the likely path to quality-preserving speculative gains; n-gram is expected to be modest.

external_references.title: MiniMax-M2.7 NVFP4 model card
external_references.note: Blackwell reference reports high throughput using TP2/EP2, FP8 KV, and specialized MoE runners; useful as an architecture target but not directly portable to XPU.

external_references.title: MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.7 model card
external_references.note: Upstream recommends vLLM/SGLang and temperature=1.0, top_p=0.95, top_k=40 for inference quality.

next_steps: Do not promote the direct Q/K helper without fusing it back into the existing INT4 GEMM/RMS compiled region or eliminating the tiny allreduce wait.
Avoid TP2/PP2 for single-session MiniMax unless running multiple concurrent sequences to fill the pipeline.
Investigate XPU support for fp8_e5m2 KV separately; generic fp8 is not a throughput win at 512 context.
Focus next on true allreduce+RMS/projection fusion, XPU communication scheduling, and llm-scaler INT4 MoE kernel internals.
